title: ITE Monthly Financial Assistance Scheme (MFAS)
text:
ITE Monthly Financial Assistance Scheme (MFAS) - SupportGoWhere
ITE Monthly Financial Assistance Scheme (MFAS)
Share link
Provides a monthly allowance to full-time Singaporean students from lower-income households who need regular financial assistance for daily expenses.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Monthly allowance of $200 per month with effect from Academic Year 2026
Apply online via the ITE portal. Click on iStudent icon > Financial Assistance icon.
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Monthly allowance of $200 per month

The number of months of award will depend on the needs of each individual student

Who is this for?

Full-time Singaporean ITE students who require regular financial assistance

How to apply?

You can apply online via the ITE portal

If you need more help, refer to the step by step guide.

Where can I find help?

View more details

ITE Hotline: 1800 222 2111

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 19 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
